sys_atf_step.description: Insert a record into 'change_request' with the following values: Requested by = {{Step 1: Create a User.User}} and Account = Itminds Consultoria Em Tecnologia Da Informacao and MS Product = Managed Services - Custom and Configuration Items = Shared Switch Port and Does this change require Customer approval? = false and Requires Notification? = Yes and Short description = ATF Testing and Description = ATF Testing and Change Justification = ATF Testing and Has this change been attempted before? = No and Planned start date = 2026-02-06 00:00:00 and Impact Scope = Internal and Impact Type = No Impact and Planned end date = 2026-02-13 00:00:00 and Category = Infrastructure and Subcategory = Databases and CHG Manager = {{Step 1: Create a User.User}} and CHG Implementer = {{Step 1: Create a User.User}} and CHG Technical Supervisor = {{Step 1: Create a User.User}} and Review By Individual = {{Step 1: Create a User.User}} and Review by group = Change Management and Assignment group = EMS L2 OpsCenter AMER and Assigned to = Adriano Brigario and Bypass Account rules = true and Type = Normal and Risk Analysis and Mitigation Plan = Risk Analysis and Mitigation Plan and Describe the reason = Risk Analysis and Mitigation Plan and Description of the impact = Description of the impact and Downtime expected = No and Total Expected Downtime = 1 Hour and Implementation plan = Implementation plan and Rollback Plan = Rollback Plan and Current and Required Situation = Current and Required Situation Confirm the record was successfully inserted

sys_variable_value.value: requested_by={{step['04d274c21bbaba58bd075425604bcbf8'].user}}^u_account=bfad69fb4f302700f3d33d828110c7df^u_ms_product=82c73f2bdb519b00448b01a3ca9619e9^u_configuration_items=fe98f4fc4fc5ab00f3d33d828110c706^u_customer_approval=false^u_requires_cmr=yes^short_description=ATF Testing^description=ATF Testing^justification=ATF Testing^u_attempted_before=no^start_date=2026-02-06 00:00:00^u_internal_or_external=internal^u_type_of_impact=no impact^end_date=2026-02-13 00:00:00^category=Infrastructure^u_case_subcategory=Databases^u_cm_owner={{step['04d274c21bbaba58bd075425604bcbf8'].user}}^u_person_s_who_wil_implement_the_change={{step['04d274c21bbaba58bd075425604bcbf8'].user}}^u_person_s_overseeing_the_change_implementation={{step['04d274c21bbaba58bd075425604bcbf8'].user}}^u_reviewed_by={{step['04d274c21bbaba58bd075425604bcbf8'].user}}^u_review_by_group=a715cd759f2002002920bde8132e7018^assignment_group=ff72689247ee1e143cbfe07a216d4357^assigned_to=fca5c5fc4faa0700f5e08e1f0210c7ff^u_bypass_rules=true^type=normal^risk_impact_analysis=Risk Analysis and Mitigation Plan ^u_describe_the_reason=Risk Analysis and Mitigation Plan ^u_description_of_the_impact=Description of the impact ^u_downtime_expected=No^u_total_expected_downtime=javascript:gs.getDurationDate('0 1:0:0')^implementation_plan=Implementation plan ^backout_plan=Rollback Plan ^u_current_and_required_situation=Current and Required Situation ^EQ

sys_element_mapping.value: requested_by={{step['04d274c21bbaba58bd075425604bcbf8'].user}}^u_account=bfad69fb4f302700f3d33d828110c7df^u_ms_product=82c73f2bdb519b00448b01a3ca9619e9^u_configuration_items=fe98f4fc4fc5ab00f3d33d828110c706^u_customer_approval=false^u_requires_cmr=yes^short_description=ATF Testing^description=ATF Testing^justification=ATF Testing^u_attempted_before=no^start_date=2026-02-06 00:00:00^u_internal_or_external=internal^u_type_of_impact=no impact^end_date=2026-02-13 00:00:00^category=Infrastructure^u_case_subcategory=Databases^u_cm_owner={{step['04d274c21bbaba58bd075425604bcbf8'].user}}^u_person_s_who_wil_implement_the_change={{step['04d274c21bbaba58bd075425604bcbf8'].user}}^u_person_s_overseeing_the_change_implementation={{step['04d274c21bbaba58bd075425604bcbf8'].user}}^u_reviewed_by={{step['04d274c21bbaba58bd075425604bcbf8'].user}}^u_review_by_group=a715cd759f2002002920bde8132e7018^assignment_group=ff72689247ee1e143cbfe07a216d4357^assigned_to=fca5c5fc4faa0700f5e08e1f0210c7ff^u_bypass_rules=true^type=normal^risk_impact_analysis=Risk Analysis and Mitigation Plan ^u_describe_the_reason=Risk Analysis and Mitigation Plan ^u_description_of_the_impact=Description of the impact ^u_downtime_expected=No^u_total_expected_downtime=javascript:gs.getDurationDate('0 1:0:0')^implementation_plan=Implementation plan ^backout_plan=Rollback Plan ^u_current_and_required_situation=Current and Required Situation ^EQ
